sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
(2003) Act, 2005.

sections.heading: On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it is Supplemen­
sections.text:
On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it is Supplemen­
hereby confirmed that there was expended from the general tary
revenues of the Republic such moneys, in respect of the services appropria­
tion
of the Republic specified in the third column of the Schedule, being
expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated for the services
of the Republic by the Appropriation Act, 2003. Act No 8 of
2003
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K1500 each
